title: Unify entry points: build the single `uacp` CLI + generalize tool_specs into a command registry (CLI + MCP = two thin adapters); migrate all 12 scripts/*.py to `uacp <cmd>`
notes: DESIGN DONE (design/entrypoints/ bundle, 2 nodes). BUILD DEFERRED until after Phase C (uacp-lint/fmt from node 33 / D8 are the first folded commands). Pattern: one command registry + a per-command `class` (taxonomy + per-command map in design/entrypoints/00 §3 + 01 §1 — classed by MUTATION not dev-ness; migrations are operator-mutating → audit required) + a CLI adapter (cli.py via pyproject [project.scripts] uacp) mirroring the existing MCP adapter over tool_specs. Migrate the 12 scripts incrementally (lint first). Grounded: tool_specs.py IS the registry; the MCP server is already a thin adapter (call_tool->spec.handler).

title: Phase-C follow-ons: entity-writer governed-tool exposure + Guardian unbypassable cutover; projection re-ground (D42); markdown write-time structural validation
notes: Three cross-cutting Phase-C remainders, each grounded in as-built constraints (NOT safe in-session increments): (1) GOVERNED-TOOL EXPOSURE + UNBYPASSABLE CUTOVER — the Guardian is TOOL-keyed (tool_classification), not path-keyed, so making validate-on-write unbypassable is a BREAKING cross-runtime migration: add a uacp_entity_write tool + handler + tool_specs entry + artifact.manifest category + tool_classification + Layer-B phase grammar (phase_transitions.py stages, codified in CODE) + MCP/plugin manifest parity + ~5 test updates, THEN restrict uacp_artifact_write's manifest roots once the entity-writer handles ALL manifest kinds (today: scope YAML + markdown body). (2) PROJECTION RE-GROUND (D42, task T-006) — blocked on node-33 schema-reconciliation BUILD; rewrites _project + 22 gate tests to real shapes. (3) MARKDOWN write-time structural validation — content-based required-section check in the entity-writer (currently deferred to the transition gate's carved validators on the persisted file). BUILT this session: entity-writer engine (engines/manifest/{entity_writer,governed_writers,validators,projection}.py) with validate-on-write (YAML ratcheted)/watermark/atomic-register/multi-instance/markdown-write.
